'''Gruu Dunrik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] who was once a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] who studied at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] in the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Despite passing through the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]], Dunrik was never selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] for further training as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and therefore left the Order.

Several decades later, Dunrik was serving as a medical officer in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] on [[Aargonar 3]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Gruu Dunrik received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. An [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] in the [[Jedi academy|Temple's academy]], Dunrik successfully [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduate]] from the academy with intentions to study as a [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Guardian]]; however he was not selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] in the time following his achievement. Per the Order's strict bylaws, Dunrik could not progress without a master and was therefore not permitted to remain at the Temple.<ref name="RES" />

Dunrik's life after he left the Order is unknown; he may have left the Order completely, or been reassigned to the [[Jedi Service Corps/Legends|Jedi Service Corps]], most likely the [[Medical Corps/Legends|Medical Corps]] as he would later find work as a medic after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the disbanding of the Jedi Order. As he was not a member of the Order during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Dunrik did not fall victim to the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. When the oppression of the Empire spurned rebellion, Dunrik joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] as a medical officer and was stationed at the Alliance's [[Aargonar 3 rebel base|bases]] on [[Aargonar 3]]. During his time with the Alliance, Doctor Dunrik longed to see the Order restored, and would try and intercept any Force-sensitives that he detected. Using his minimal knowledge in the Force, Dunrik sought to unlock the hidden potential within his patients with the thought that one day they could pose a threat to the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] himself.<ref name="RES" />
